name: Thai Style Fried Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil noodles in ample lightly salted water for about 7 minutes, or until al dente. Drain.
2. Heat the oil in a wok over medium heat. Add the garlic and stir-fry until the color changes.
3. Add the noodles and stir well.
4. Add all the SEASONINGS and stir-fry for 5 to 7 minutes, being careful not to break the noodles.
5. Transfer to a serving dish and serve the CONDIMENTS in small dishes on the side. You might want to sprinkle some extra sugar on the noodles.
